title: Acceptance of Claim Settlement
text: Evidence that a person has accepted or offered or promised to accept a sum of money or any other thing, act, or service in satisfaction of a claim, as well as any conduct or statements made in negotiation thereof, is inadmissible to prove the invalidity of the claim or any part of it.

structure.division_title: Evidence Affected or Excluded by Extrinsic Policies
structure.chapter_title: Other Evidence Affected or Excluded by Extrinsic Policies
